HGSS.655.0001:
Hello? [0103,0000,0000]?\f
I’ve gotten so used to hearing your
voice, but you almost sound like\r
a different person on the phone.\r
It’s so strange...
HGSS.655.0002:
Hello? [0103,0000,0000]?\f
I’ve gotten so used to hearing your
voice, but you almost sound like\r
a different person on the phone.\r
It’s so strange...
HGSS.655.0003:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]! Working hard?
That sounds really tough.\f
But, [0103,0000,0000], I know you’re really
determined. You’ll be OK, right?
HGSS.655.0004:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
Wasn’t Professor Elm waiting for you?
HGSS.655.0005:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
So, how goes the errand you’re\r
helping Professor Elm with?\f
I know you’re determined. You’ll be OK!
HGSS.655.0006:
Hello?\f
Hi, [0103,0000,0000]! If you’re done with
your errand, come on home, dear.
HGSS.655.0007:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
What’s going on? How are you getting\r
along with your Pokémon?\f
You know, I’ve found that if you’re
affectionate to your Pokémon, they\r
respond in kind.\f
HGSS.655.0008:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]! Working hard?
You’re visiting Cherrygrove City?\f
You know, you’re pretty close...
How about coming home for a bit?\f
HGSS.655.0009:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]! Working hard?
Oh, so you’re in Violet City...\f
Isn’t that where Sprout Tower
is? Did you go take a look?\f
HGSS.655.0010:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]! Working hard?
Oh, so you’re in Azalea Town...\f
Isn’t that where the SLOWPOKE Well
is? Did you go take a look?\f
HGSS.655.0011:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]! Working hard?
Oh, so you’re in Cianwood City...\f
Isn’t that where they’re building that
Safari Zone? Is it open yet?\f
HGSS.655.0012:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]! Working hard?
Oh, so you’re in Goldenrod City...\f
Isn’t that where the Radio Tower
is? Did you go take a look?\f
HGSS.655.0013:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]! Working hard?
Oh, so you’re in Olivine City...\f
Isn’t that where that big Lighthouse
is? Did you go take a look?\f
HGSS.655.0014:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]! Working hard?
Oh, so you’re in Ecruteak City...\f
Isn’t that where the Bell Tower
is? Did you go take a look?\f
HGSS.655.0015:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]! Working hard?
Wow, you’re in [0104,0002,0000]?\f
Good luck on your Pokémon quest!\f
HGSS.655.0016:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]! Working hard?\f
Wow, you’re in [0104,0002,0000]?\f
Well, as your mom, I know you’re doing
your best wherever you go!\f
HGSS.655.0017:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]! You sound happy!
I feel so much better!\f
HGSS.655.0018:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]! Working hard?
That sounds really tough.\f
But, [0103,0000,0000], I know you’re really
determined. You’ll be OK, right?\f
HGSS.655.0019:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]! Working hard?\f
You’re in Kanto?! Wow, that’s
wonderful, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.655.0020:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]! You’re trying out
the Pokéathlon? Do your best!\r
As your mom, I’m cheering you on!\f
HGSS.655.0021:
You haven’t gone to pick up those items
I bought for you yet, have you?\f
Don’t forget to head to the Poké Mart
and talk to the deliveryman.
HGSS.655.0022:
Hello?\f
...[0103,0000,0000]?\f
I heard from Professor Elm that you
went on a long trip.\f
I wish you would have told me...
What about your money? Should I\r
save it?
HGSS.655.0023:
By the way, you’ve saved up $[0137,000A,0000].
Do you want to keep on saving?
HGSS.655.0024:
By the way, [0103,0000,0000], you’ve saved
up $[0137,000A,0000].\r
Want to start saving again?
HGSS.655.0025:
OK. I’ll save your money.\f
[0103,0000,0000], keep it up! I’m rooting
for you, baby!
HGSS.655.0026:
OK. I won’t save your money.\f
[0103,0000,0000], keep it up! I’m rooting
for you, baby!
HGSS.655.0027:
It’s important to
save your money.
HGSS.655.0028:
Oh, [0103,0000,0000], you’re not saving
any money. Would you like to save? [0200,0000]
HGSS.655.0029:
Hello?\f
Oh, hi, [0103,0000,0000]! How are you?\f
I found a useful item while shopping, so
I bought it with your money. Sorry!\f
But I asked the deliveryman to take it
to you, so you should stop by the\r
nearest Poké Mart or Department Store\r
and pick it up! I know it’ll be useful!
